title: phaseoloides atropurpureum
intro: Phaseoloides atropurpureum, also known as the purple flowered sensitive plant, is a species of flowering plant in the pea family Fabaceae. This plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antiseptic, and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Phaseoloides atropurpureum include reducing fever, relieving pain, and treating various skin conditions, as well as its potential to lower blood sugar levels and improve cardiovascular health. Herbal preparations of this plant are often made into teas, infusions, or tinctures, and can be used externally to treat wounds or skin irritations, or taken internally to promote overall well-being.
